info.name: 360Ghar Real Estate Platform API
info.description:
Complete API collection for 360Ghar - Tinder-like real estate platform with comprehensive property filtering, Supabase integration, and AI-powered agents.

## Setup Instructions:
1. Import this collection into Postman
2. Create/Import the environment variables
3. Update SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_KEY in environment
4. Start with Login endpoint to get access token
5. Token will be automatically saved and used for subsequent requests

## API Modules:
- **Authentication**: User signup, login, and token management
- **Users**: Profile management and preferences
- **Properties**: Comprehensive property search with 25+ filters, discovery, and details
- **Swipes**: Tinder-like property swiping functionality
- **Visits**: Property visit scheduling with agents
- **Bookings**: Short-stay property bookings
- **Agents**: 360Ghar employee agent management and assignment

## Property Search Capabilities:
The Properties module includes 15 different search scenarios covering:
- **Location-Based Search**: Radius filtering with lat/lng coordinates
- **Property Types**: Single or multiple property types (apartment, house, builder_floor, room)
- **Price Filtering**: Min/max price ranges with sorting
- **Room Filters**: Bedroom and bathroom count filtering
- **Text Search**: Full-text search across title, description, locality, city
- **Area Filtering**: Property size in square feet
- **Location Filters**: City, locality, and pincode filtering
- **Amenities**: Multiple amenity requirements (Parking, Gym, etc.)
- **Short Stay**: Guest capacity, check-in/out dates
- **Sorting Options**: Distance, price (low/high), newest, popularity, relevance
- **Additional Filters**: Parking spaces, floor number, property age
- **Comprehensive Filtering**: All filters combined

## Agent System:
The platform features 360Ghar employee agents who serve as relationship managers:
- **Auto-assignment**: New users automatically get assigned agents
- **Specializations**: Agents specialize in different property types and services
- **Performance tracking**: Real-time monitoring of agent effectiveness
- **Load balancing**: Intelligent distribution of users across agents

## Features:
- Automatic token management
- Comprehensive response validation tests
- Example data for all requests
- Performance monitoring
- Error handling
- Environment variable management
- Property filter validation and testing
